backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing a paste-sharing service with blob storage, access control, user profiles, paste CRUD operations with expiration times, password protection, and legacy ID mapping.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting the implementation of enhanced frontend error handling for paste-not-found scenarios with detailed diagnostic information.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend source files describing routing, authentication, paste operations, error handling, utilities, and UI components.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS configuration with OKLCH color system variables for light and dark themes, including custom design tokens for UI components.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with viewport meta tags and root div for React application mounting.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component with QueryClient provider, hash-based routing logic, and conditional page rendering for create, view, and history routes with paste ID validation.
frontend/src/components/AppLayout.tsx: Shared layout wrapper providing header with logo and navigation, conditional History link for authenticated users, login button, and footer with attribution.
frontend/src/components/ErrorState.tsx: Reusable error display component showing contextual messages for expired, not-found, and error states with optional paste ID and diagnostic details in formatted alerts.
frontend/src/components/LoginButton.tsx: Authentication button component managing Internet Identity login/logout with loading states and query cache clearing on logout.
frontend/src/components/PasteEditModal.t: Modal component for editing existing pastes, allowing users to modify text content, add new files, change password, and extend expiration. Handles file uploads with progress tracking and validation.
frontend/src/components/UploadProgressSt: Displays upload progress UI with a progress bar, showing current file number, total files, filename, and percentage completion with a loading spinner.
frontend/src/config/pasteLimits.ts: Configuration file defining file size limits for paste uploads (50MB default), exported as both MB and byte constants.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that manages the backend actor instance, creating authenticated or anonymous actors based on Internet Identity state and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login/logout state, identity persistence, and AuthClient lifecycle with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: React Query hooks for paste operations including create, edit, delete, extend expiration, and fetch operations with file upload progress tracking and error handling.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light/dark theme colors, shared card component styles, and base styling for the application.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React root with QueryClient and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers around the main App component.
frontend/src/pages/CreatePastePage.tsx: Main page component for creating new pastes with text and file uploads, featuring authentication, password protection, expiration settings, file size validation, upload progress tracking, and shareable URL generation.
frontend/src/pages/HistoryPage.tsx: Displays authenticated user's paste history with cards showing paste details, expiration times, and edit/view actions. Handles loading, error, and empty states with appropriate UI feedback.
frontend/src/pages/PasteViewPage.tsx: Renders a single paste view with file download capabilities, owner badges, and expiration timers. Handles expired, not-found, and error states with typed error detection and retry logic.
frontend/src/utils/actorFactory.ts: Provides centralized actor creation functions for anonymous and authenticated backend communication, avoiding double-configuration warnings by properly passing identity through agentOptions.
frontend/src/utils/backendError.ts: Normalizes backend errors into user-friendly messages, detecting authorization-related errors and handling common patterns like file size limits, expiration, and network failures.
frontend/src/utils/draftEditorDiagnostic: Suppresses non-blocking draft-editor origin warnings from the Caffeine platform's preview system by filtering console.error calls, documenting that these warnings don't affect app functionality.
frontend/src/utils/fileDownload.ts: Handles file downloads from ExternalBlob with proper filename generation, MIME type to extension mapping, and cross-browser compatible download triggering with cleanup.
frontend/src/utils/formatRemainingTime.t: Converts nanosecond bigint timestamps into human-readable time strings with minute granularity (e.g., '2 days 5 hrs', '1 hr 10 min').
frontend/src/utils/pasteIds.ts: Validates, normalizes, and extracts paste IDs from routes, supporting both legacy numeric IDs and new GUID formats with URL decoding and sanitization.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting and managing URL parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support for maintaining state across navigation.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom theme extensions including OKLCH color system, Inter/JetBrains Mono fonts, custom shadows, accordion animations, and typography/container-queries/animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state tracking a paste-not-found bug where paste ID 1771799269632900371 validates on frontend but fails backend retrieval, with three pending action requests to debug storage/retrieval logic and verify ID type consistency.
